name: ALPHA 1000W 80Plus Gold Fully Modular Power Supply Unit (PSU)
shortDescription:
SKU: AZTECH A1000M80P 
 
• 1000W Power Output 
• Gold 
• Fully-modular design 
• Larger cooling fan
description:
AZTECH Alpha 1000W 80Plus Gold Fully Modular Power Supply delivers up to 90% efficiency, ensuring smooth performance with minimal energy consumption. Its fully modular design allows for cable-free customization, reducing clutter and improving airflow for better cooling. Ideal for gamers and PC enthusiasts, it combines power, efficiency, and sleek design. 
 
 
 
 
 
Specification 
Details 
 
 
 
 
Input Voltage 
100~240V AC, 80Plus Gold, Rated about 1000W (额定1000W) 
 
 
Cables 
Black Flat Cable 
 
 
Output Cables 
Mainboard 20+4P (Length: 600mm) 
SATA+SATA+SATA (Length: 500+150+150mm) 
SATA+SATA+SATA (Length: 500+150+150mm) 
IDE+IDE+IDE+FDD (Length: 500+150+150+150mm) 
CPU: P8 (4+4) (Length: 700mm, x2) 
PCI-E: P (6+2)+P (6+2) (Length: 550+150mm, x2) 
PCI-E 5.1: 12V-2X6 12+4Pin (Length: 550mm) 
 
 
Build 
Hexagonal 0.6MM black shell + 12cm silent fan + IO switch (0.6MM厚机壳+12cm静音风扇+I/O开关) 
 
 
Power Features 
Active PFC + DC TO DC, 80Plus Gold, ATX 3.1 
 
 
EMI 
With 2 true EMI (2个真实的EMI) 
 
 
Power Cord 
1.5M input power cord 
 
 
Packaging 
PP package, color box (彩盒)

name: Aerocool Case Beam-G-BK-v2 - ATX
shortDescription:
Front panel with air vents delivers superior air flow and ventilation while allowing for viewing of your front LED fans
Full tempered glass side panel showcases the inside of your rig
Two additional vertical expansion slots allow for vertical graphics card installation
Fan mounts on the PSU shroud support up to two 12cm fans for improved VGA cooling
Supports liquid cooling in the front, top, and rear of the case
Supports CPU cooler up to 160mm
Supports high-end graphics cards up to 343mm (without front radiator)
description:
Overview 
Designed with ventilation in mind, this high-performance mid tower case delivers superior air flow while allowing for viewing of your front LED fans. Full tempered glass side panel showcases the inside of your rig. Comes with two additional vertical expansion slots, allowing for vertical graphics card installation. 
 
EXPANSION SLOTS FOR VERTICAL GRAPHICS CARD INSTALLATION 
Comes with two additional vertical expansion slots, allowing you to install your graphics card at a vertical position. 
 
 
IMPROVED AIR VENTILATION 
Stylish front panel design with built-in air vents delivers increased air flow and ventilation while allowing for viewing of your front LED fans. 
 
FULL TEMPERED GLASS SIDE PANEL 
Comes equipped with a full tempered glass side panel to showcase the inside of your rig and put your components on display. 
 
COOLING FOR YOUR GRAPHICS CARD 
Fan mounts on the PSU shroud support graphics card cooling : 
2 x 120mm fans for superior VGA cooling. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
AIR COOLING 
Supports air cooling in the front, top, and rear of the case to enhance cooling performance. 
 
 Front: 120mm x 3 or 140mm x 3 (Max.) 
 Top: 120mm x 2 or 140mm x 2 (Max.) 
 Rear: 120mm x 1 (Max.) 
 PSU Shroud: 120mm x 2 (Max.) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
LIQUID COOLING 
Supports liquid cooling in the front, top, and rear of the case for maximum efficiency cooling. 
 
 Top: 120/240/280mm Radiator (Optional) 
(Fan + Radiator thickness <53mm) 
 Rear: 120mm Radiator (Optional) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
DUAL CHAMBER DESIGN 
Built with a dual chamber design to direct heat away from the main chamber for more effective all-around cooling. 
 
 
 
 
 
BUILT FOR HIGH PERFORMANCE 
 
 Supports ATX, Micro-ATX, and Mini-ITX motherboards 
 Supports CPU coolers up to 160mm 
 Supports high-end graphics cards up to 343mm (without front radiator) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
CONVENIENT ACCESS TO YOUR MEDIA 
Quick and easy access to USB 3.0 x 1, USB 2.0 x 2, HD audio and mic ports, and power & reset button. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
STORAGE CAPABILITY 
Supports up to 2 x 3.5” HDDs (2 x 3.5”/2.5″) and 4 x 2.5” SSDs (2 x 2.5” and 2 x 2.5”/3.5”). 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
EASY MAINTENANCE 
Removable dust filters for convenient cleaning and maintenance.

name: Aerocool Case Designer-G-BK-V2 -ARGB 4 / ATX / Micro / Mini ATX
shortDescription:
Modern Design – Sleek mesh front panel design with vibrant RGB fan lighting and all-black color coating for an eye-catching appearance.
Optimal thermal solution – Supports up to 8 fans including four pre-installed FRGB or ARGB fans, front and rear radiator support, and full mesh front bezel design to maximize heat dissipation.
Fits the best – Supports up to 345mm GPU, 360mm liquid cooler, and 158mm CPU cooler.
Crystal-clear tempered glass side panel to showcase interior setup.
Clean look, and easy installation & maintenance with sliding tempered glass panel mechanism.
description:
Overview 
Designer is a versatile and minimalist mid tower case for PC enthusiasts, supporting ATX, micro ATX, and mini-ITX motherboards, making it suitable for a wide range of builds. It is equipped with advanced cooling options, including four pre-installed RGB fans and 360mm liquid cooling support, ensuring efficient heat management. With its high GPU and CPU clearance, flexible storage options, and convenient I/O ports, Designer offers a perfect blend of functionality, ease of assembly, and modern aesthetics. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Modern Aesthetics 
Designer ensures your setup stands out with a ventilated, full mesh front panel, vibrant RGB fan lighting, and an all-black color coating. This eye-catching appearance not only enhances the look of your space but also complements any interior design. 
 
Cool and Controlled 
Elevate your system’s cooling with our enhanced thermal solution. Supporting up to eight fans, including four pre-installed RGB fans, and featuring both front and rear radiator support plus a ventilated front panel, our design focuses on heat dissipation to keep your system running smoothly. 
Transparent Brilliance 
Show off your system’s internals with our crystal-clear tempered glass side panel. This sleek feature allows you to display your setup in all its glory, making it a centerpiece of your gaming station. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Effortless Upkeep 
Maintain a clean system effortlessly with our included dust filters. Magnetic filters on the top and easily removable filters at the bottom make cleaning a breeze, ensuring your system remains pristine and performing at its peak. 
Wide Compatibility 
Our chassis fits the best and supports the biggest. Accommodate up to 345mm GPUs, 360mm liquid coolers, and 158mm CPU coolers, ensuring your build is only limited by your imagination, not your case. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Organized Elegance 
Achieve a neat and organized setup with our effective cable management system. A 24.5mm depth behind the motherboard tray and a dedicated PSU shroud allow for easy cable routing, keeping your setup tidy and visually appealing. 
Build Flexibility 
Enjoy unparalleled build flexibility with motherboard compatibility that spans ATX, micro ATX, and mini-ITX. Our versatile design options cater to your specific needs, offering a foundation for a wide range of system builds. 
 
Features 
 
 Modern Design – Sleek mesh front panel design with vibrant RGB fan lighting and all-black color coating for an eye-catching appearance. 
 Optimal thermal solution – Supports up to 8 fans including four pre-installed FRGB or ARGB fans, front and rear radiator support, and full mesh front bezel design to maximize heat dissipation. 
 Fits the best – Supports up to 345mm GPU, 360mm liquid cooler, and 158mm CPU cooler. 
 Crystal-clear tempered glass side panel to showcase interior setup. 
 Clean look, and easy installation & maintenance with sliding tempered glass panel mechanism. 
 Clean System Maintenance – Dust filters included on the top (magnetic) and the bottom for easy cleaning. 
 Motherboard Compatibility – Fits ATX, micro ATX, and mini-ITX, offering versatile build options. 
 Effective Cable Management – 24.5 mm depth and PSU shroud for easier for neat and efficient cable organization. 
 Storage Flexibility – Max. 3.5”x2 & 2.5”x2 or max 2.5”x4 drive bays for flexible storage solutions. 
 Convenient I/O Ports – Equipped with USB3.0, USB2.0, and HD Audio & Mic for easy peripheral connectivity.

name: Aerocool Case  B507F-G ARGB 4 / ATX / Micro / Mini ATX - TYPE C
shortDescription:
Panoramic Glass Panels: Enjoy a stunning wraparound view with tempered glass front and side panels.
Superior Cooling: Supports liquid coolers up to 360mm, 10 fan slots, and includes 4 pre-installed ARGB fans.
Optimal Airflow: Integrated ventilation and dust cover ensure natural airflow to keep your components cool.
Durable Build: Constructed with robust SPCC material for long-lasting durability.
Versatile Compatibility: Supports ATX, Micro ATX, and Mini-ITX motherboards.
Easy Maintenance: Dust filters and spacious design make maintenance a breeze.
description:
Overview 
The Aerocool B507F-G ARGB is a premium mid-tower gaming case designed to deliver stunning aesthetics and top-tier functionality. Engineered for gamers and PC builders who demand both performance and flair, this case comes equipped with four dazzling ARGB fans pre-installed — providing brilliant illumination and efficient cooling right out of the box. 
 
Key Features: 
 
 
4 Pre-installed ARGB Fans: Enjoy customizable lighting effects with addressable RGB support, controllable via the RGB button or compatible motherboard software. 
 
 
High-Speed Type-C Port: Features a USB 3.1 Type-C port for ultra-fast data transfer and next-generation device connectivity. 
 
 
Optimized Airflow Design: Front mesh panel ensures superior ventilation, keeping your system cool under heavy loads. 
 
 
Multi-Form Factor Support: Compatible with ATX, Micro-ATX, and Mini-ITX motherboards — perfect for flexible PC builds. 
 
 
Tempered Glass Side Panel: Showcase your powerful components and lighting setup with a clear, durable glass window. 
 
 
Ample Hardware Support: Fits large GPUs, multiple storage drives, and high-performance cooling systems with ease. 
 
 
Cable Management Ready: Clean internal layout with smart routing channels for a professional build appearance. 
 
 
Specifications: 
 
 
Motherboard Support: ATX / Micro-ATX / Mini-ITX 
 
 
Front I/O Ports: USB 3.0 ×1, USB 2.0 ×2, Audio In/Out, Type-C ×1, LED Control Button 
 
 
Cooling Support: Up to 6 fans total (4 ARGB fans included) 
 
 
Radiator Support: 240mm front / 120mm rear 
 
 
Side Panel: Tempered glass 
 
 
Color: Black 
 
 
 
 
 
Why Choose Aerocool B507F-G? 
The Aerocool B507F-G isn’t just a case — it’s a statement. With superior airflow, RGB aesthetics, and modern connectivity, it’s built for gamers who want performance without compromise.

name: Aerocool Case Dryft-G-BK-v2 - ATX / Micro / Mini ITX
shortDescription:
Liquid Cooling Ready: Compatible with various liquid cooling configurations.
Pre-Installed RGB Fans: Six pre-installed fans with customizable lighting effects.
High-End Component Support: Accommodates GPU up to 419mm and CPU cooler up to 162mm.
Dual Chamber Design: Improved cable management for a clean and clutter-free interior.
Storage Options: Two SSD slots and one 3.5″ HDD drive bay.
Convenient I/O Ports: Easy access to USB 3.0, USB 2.0, and HD audio ports.
Compatibility: Supports ATX, Micro-ATX, and mini-ITX motherboards.
description:
Overview 
Experience the stunning panoramic view of Dryft. The unique design allows the full tempered glass front and side panels to provide a perfectly clear view of your hardware. Designed with a focus on elegant aesthetics, customizable RGB lighting, improved cooling, and easy cable management, Dryft is the perfect choice for gamers seeking both style and functionality. 
Panoramic Glass Panels 
 
 
 
 
 
 
The pre-installed cooling fans have been moved to the backplate so that the full tempered glass front and side panels can clearly showcase the heart of your rig. Display your high-performance components and vibrant RGB lighting in all their glory. 
Pre-Installed RGB Fans 
Experience cooling that looks great right out of the box with Dryft. It comes equipped with a total of six pre-installed fans, including two 14cm RGB fans at the front and four 12cm RGB fans. Enjoy customizable lighting effects and multiple speed settings to suit your style. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Versatile Cooling Options 
Take control of your system’s thermals with Dryft. It supports up to 10 fans, allowing you to optimize cooling performance. The case features air vents in the side panel, ensuring efficient airflow and circulation. The bottom panel fans provide localized cooling for your GPU. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Liquid Cooling Ready 
For those seeking even greater cooling potential, Dryft has you covered. It supports various liquid cooling configurations, including radiators of up to 360mm in the top and bottom, 280mm in the side, and 120mm in the rear. Keep your system running at peak performance, even during demanding tasks. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Dual Chamber Design 
With Dryft’s dual chamber design, cable management becomes a breeze. Enjoy improved airflow and a clean, clutter-free interior for optimal performance. The internal cable management depth of 96mm provides ample space to route and hide your cables effectively. 
Compatibility and Expandability 
Dryft is compatible with ATX, Micro-ATX, and mini-ITX motherboards, ensuring versatility for your build. It supports CPU coolers up to 162mm in height and high-end graphics cards up to 419mm, allowing you to unleash your hardware’s full potential. 
 
Convenient I/O Ports 
Stay connected and easily access your peripherals with the convenient I/O ports located on the top of the case. Equipped with USB 3.0 and USB 2.0 ports, as well as HD audio, you’ll have everything you need at your fingertips. 
 
Storage Options 
Don’t compromise on storage. Dryft offers two SSD slots and one 3.5″ HDD drive bay, providing ample room for your games, media, and files. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Easy Maintenance 
Cleaning and maintaining your system is a breeze with Dryft’s magnetic top and bottom filters. Simply remove and clean them to keep your components dust-free and running smoothly.

name: Aerocool Case P500C-G-BK-v1
shortDescription:
Mid-tower case featuring full tempered glass front and side panels for interior viewing.
Includes 3 pre-installed 12cm reverse-blade ARGB fans in the side panel and 1 pre-installed 12cm ARGB fan in the rear.
Each included fan has special “mirage” infinity mirror lighting effect.
Supports radiators up to 360mm in the top and bottom of case, 280mm in the side, and 120mm in the rear.
Magnetic top and bottom filters allow for easy cleaning and maintenance.
Dual chamber design for improved cable management.
Supports CPU cooler up to 162mm and high-end graphics cards up to 450mm.
Includes 3 SSD slots and 2 HDD drive bays.
Available in black or white.
description:
Overview 
The AeroCool P500C is a mid-tower PC case featuring full tempered glass front and side panels for stunning interior views, complemented by four pre-installed ARGB fans (including three with reverse blades) with a unique “mirage” infinity mirror lighting effect. It offers versatile cooling options, supporting both air and liquid cooling configurations up to 360mm, and includes a 4-port PWM ARGB fan hub for enhanced performance. Designed for ATX, micro-ATX and mini-ITX motherboards, the P500C supports high-end graphics cards up to 450mm, CPU coolers up to 162mm, and provides ample storage with three SSD slots and two HDD drive bays, while ensuring easy maintenance with top and bottom magnetic filters. 
Crystal-Clear Visibility 
Show off your build in style with curved tempered glass front and side panels that provide panoramic view of your PC’s interior. 
 
 
 
Out of the Box Performance 
Enjoy immediate performance and lighting with three 12cm reverse-blade ARGB fans in the side panel and one 12cm ARGB fan in the rear, all controlled via a 4-port PWM ARGB fan hub. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Side 
120 mm x3 
ARGB Fan Included 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Rear 
120 mm x1 
ARGB Fan Included 
Hypnotic Mirage Lighting 
Each included fan features a mesmerizing “mirage” infinity mirror effect that adds depth and dynamic visuals to your setup. 
Superior Cooling Support 
Along with 10 total fan slots, support for radiators up to 360mm on the top and bottom, 280mm on the side, and 120mm in the rear ensures optimal thermal performance. 
 
Easy Maintenance Filters 
Maintain a clean and efficient system with magnetic top and bottom filters that allow for effortless cleaning and dust prevention. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Tidy Cable Management 
Benefit from a dual chamber design that enhances cable management, providing a cleaner look and better airflow inside your case. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
96 mm 
Cable Management Depth 
Accommodates High-End Hardware 
Install high-performance components with ease, as the P500C supports CPU coolers up to 162mm and graphics cards up to 450mm in length.

name: Aerocool Case P500C-G-WT-v1
shortDescription:
Mid-tower case featuring full tempered glass front and side panels for interior viewing.
Includes 3 pre-installed 12cm reverse-blade ARGB fans in the side panel and 1 pre-installed 12cm ARGB fan in the rear.
Each included fan has special “mirage” infinity mirror lighting effect.
Supports radiators up to 360mm in the top and bottom of case, 280mm in the side, and 120mm in the rear.
Magnetic top and bottom filters allow for easy cleaning and maintenance.
Dual chamber design for improved cable management.
Supports CPU cooler up to 162mm and high-end graphics cards up to 450mm.
Includes 3 SSD slots and 2 HDD drive bays.
Available in black or white.
description:
Overview 
The AeroCool P500C is a mid-tower PC case featuring full tempered glass front and side panels for stunning interior views, complemented by four pre-installed ARGB fans (including three with reverse blades) with a unique “mirage” infinity mirror lighting effect. It offers versatile cooling options, supporting both air and liquid cooling configurations up to 360mm, and includes a 4-port PWM ARGB fan hub for enhanced performance. Designed for ATX, micro-ATX and mini-ITX motherboards, the P500C supports high-end graphics cards up to 450mm, CPU coolers up to 162mm, and provides ample storage with three SSD slots and two HDD drive bays, while ensuring easy maintenance with top and bottom magnetic filters. 
Crystal-Clear Visibility 
Show off your build in style with curved tempered glass front and side panels that provide panoramic view of your PC’s interior. 
 
 
 
Out of the Box Performance 
Enjoy immediate performance and lighting with three 12cm reverse-blade ARGB fans in the side panel and one 12cm ARGB fan in the rear, all controlled via a 4-port PWM ARGB fan hub. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Side 
120 mm x3 
ARGB Fan Included 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Rear 
120 mm x1 
ARGB Fan Included 
Hypnotic Mirage Lighting 
Each included fan features a mesmerizing “mirage” infinity mirror effect that adds depth and dynamic visuals to your setup. 
Superior Cooling Support 
Along with 10 total fan slots, support for radiators up to 360mm on the top and bottom, 280mm on the side, and 120mm in the rear ensures optimal thermal performance. 
 
Easy Maintenance Filters 
Maintain a clean and efficient system with magnetic top and bottom filters that allow for effortless cleaning and dust prevention. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Tidy Cable Management 
Benefit from a dual chamber design that enhances cable management, providing a cleaner look and better airflow inside your case. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
96 mm 
Cable Management Depth 
Accommodates High-End Hardware 
Install high-performance components with ease, as the P500C supports CPU coolers up to 162mm and graphics cards up to 450mm in length.

name: Aerocool Powersupply Mirage Gold 850W Fully Modular
shortDescription:
80Plus Gold Certified for up to 90%+ efficiency
Fully modular design provides you with full control of your cables
Infinity Mirror RGB design delivers a mesmerizing look and feel to your gaming setup
Addressable RGB can be controlled using LED control button or compatible ARGB motherboard
Built-in 105°C Japanese main capacitors provides low ripples and higher durability for PSU and all PC systems
DC-to-DC conversion circuit for higher efficiency and tight voltage regulation even under heavy cross-loading conditions
Equipped with 12cm high-pressure fan with optimized thermal fan speed control
Dual CPU power connectors allows for compatibility with high-end Intel and AMD Ryzen CPUs
description:
Overview 
High-performance 80Plus Gold power supply with an Infinity Mirror RGB design that delivers a truly unique and mesmerizing lighting experience. Fully modular design provides you with full control of your cables, allowing for super efficient cable management and improved air flow. 
 
Addressable RGB can be controlled using one of two ways: RGB LED control button or Addressable RGB motherboard. The new Mirage PSU series is perfect for DIY PC builders who want a top-class power supply without breaking the bank. 
 
 
UP TO 90%+ EFFICIENCY 
80Plus Gold Certified for up to 90%+ efficiency, delivering maximum efficiency performance. 
INFINITY MIRROR RGB DESIGN 
Featuring a glass mirror design with a single RGB LED strip, the Mirage Gold achieves an infinity effect with what seems like endless RGB strips to deliver a truly unique and mesmerizing lighting experience. 
ADDRESSABLE RGB COMPATIBLE 
Stylize and personalize your lighting experience with 16.8 million colors by connecting your power supply to your Addressable RGB motherboard. 
 
To switch between motherboard and button control: 
 
 Make sure PSU is connected to motherboard’s ARGB header 
 Hold button on PSU for 3 seconds 
 Control will switch from PSU to motherboard. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
FULL MODULAR POWER SUPPLY 
Fully modular design provides you with full control of your cables, allowing for super efficient cable management and improved air flow to achieve the best possible cooling performance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
BUILT-IN 105°C JAPANESE CAPACITORS 
Built-in 105°C Japanese capacitors provide uncompromised performance, reliability and durability even under the most demanding conditions. 
 
DC-TO-DC CONVERSION CIRCUIT 
Built-in DC-to-DC conversion circuit for higher efficiency and tight voltage regulation even under heavy cross-loading conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
OPTIMIZED THERMAL FAN SPEED CONTROL 
Optimized fan speed allows for near inaudible fan noise and silent PSU operation. 
Smart thermal fan control keeps the fan running at startup speed before reaching 60% load at 40°C ambient temperatures. 
 
 
ESTED FOR RELIABILITY AND PERFORMANCE 
Having undergone test after test under strict conditions and the highest standards of quality, the Mirage Gold ensures premium reliability, durability, and performance. 
 
 
 
 
 
ACTIVE POWER FACTOR CORRECTION 
Built-in APFC providing higher voltage stabilization and lower power consumption (Active Power Factor Correction rate > 0.9. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
CONVENIENT CABLE MANAGEMENT 
Soft, black, flat cables allow for more convenient cable management and easier installation. 
DUAL CPU POWER CONNECTORS 
Dual CPU power connectors allows for compatibility with high-end Intel and AMD Ryzen CPUs.

name: Aerocool Powersupply LUX 750W 230V APFC
shortDescription:
• 80Plus 230V EU Bronze Certified for up to 88%+ efficiency 
• Built-in APFC (Active Power Factor Correction) rates > 0.9 
• OPP/OVP/UVP/SCP electrical protection included 
• 30% Increased ventilation area in the body of the PSU allows for increased air flow 
• Silent 12cm black fan with optimized thermal fan speed control 
• Compatible with all Intel form factors up to ATX12V Ver.2.4 
• Soft, black, flat cables allow for more convenient cable management 
 
Specifications are subject to change without notice. 
Products and models may vary depending on your region. 
Contact your local retailer for more information.
description:
Overview 
Featuring a stylish and elegant design, the LUX PSU delivers the perfect balance between power and luxury. This premium quality power supply efficiently powers your system while elevating the look and feel of your setup. 
 
80Plus 230V EU Bronze Certified, the LUX delivers up to 88%+ efficiency for top-notch performance. 30% Increased ventilation area in the body of the PSU allows for increased air flow and circulation 
UP TO 88%+ EFFICIENCY 
80Plus 230V EU Bronze Certified for high efficiency performance. 
STYLISH, ELEGANT DESIGN 
Featuring a stylish, elegant design, the LUX PSU is the perfect balance between power and luxury. 
 
This power supply elevates the look and feel of your rig while delivering maximum efficiency power. 
IMPROVED AIR VENTILATION 
30% Increased ventilation area in the body of the PSU allows for increased air flow and circulation, preventing your system from overheating. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
OPTIMIZED FAN RPM 
12cm silent black fan with optimized thermal fan speed control. Fan runs at startup speed (less than 800RPM) before reaching 60% load at 25℃ ambient temperatures 
 
CONVENIENT CABLE MANAGEMENT 
Soft, black, flat cables allow for more convenient cable management and easier installation.

name: Aerocool Powersupply Integrator Gold 750W Fully Modular
shortDescription:
Compatible with all Intel form factors up to ATX12V Ver.3.0.
3yr - GEN 3.0 & PCIE 5.0 Supports
All premium Japanese branding capacitors.
12cm silent black fan with optimized thermal fan speed control, plus 0RPM mode operation in low load.
Fully modular design allows for easy cable management and installation
Four PCIe 6+2pin connectors for high-end graphics card.
Certified by CE and UKCA for safe operation.
Up to 90%+ efficiency with official 80Plus Gold certificate.
description:
Overview 
The most affordable 80Plus Gold power supply unit that delivers high efficiency and stable power output with minimum noise. Now with optimized fan speed curve and fully modular soft black cables for better cable management. 
 
 
UP TO 92%+ EFFICIENCY 
80Plus Gold Certified for high efficiency performance. 
FULL MODULAR POWER SUPPLY 
Fully modular design provides you with full control of your cables, allowing for super efficient cable management and improved air flow to achieve the best possible cooling performance. 
TESTED FOR RELIABILITY AND PERFORMANCE 
Having undergone test after test under strict conditions and the highest standards of quality, the INTEGRATOR GOLD ensures premium reliability, durability, and performance. 
ACTIVE POWER FACTOR CORRECTION 
Built-in APFC providing higher voltage stabilization and lower power consumption (Active Power Factor Correction rate > 0.9. 
 
 
 
 
 
PREMIUM 105°C JAPANESE CAPACITORS 
Built-in premium 105°C Japanese capacitors provide uncompromised performance, reliability and durability even under the most demanding conditions. 
 
Due to supply chain sourcing, premium capacitors from any of the following brands may be used: Rubycon, Nichicon, and Nippon Chemi-Con. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
DC-TO-DC CONVERSION CIRCUIT 
Built-in DC-to-DC conversion circuit for higher efficiency and tight voltage regulation even under heavy cross-loading conditions. 
OPTIMIZED THERMAL FAN SPEED CONTROL 
Optimized fan speed allows for near inaudible fan noise and silent PSU operation. 
 
12cm silent black fan with optimized thermal fan speed control, plus 0RPM mode operation in low load. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
CONNECTOR READY TO BE COMPATIBLE WITH HIGH END SYSTEM 
]\ 
 
 
CABLES 
 
 
Features: 
 
 Single 12V rail for high current output and compatibility. 
 Long cable length provide easy accessibility to all components. 
 All DC cables equipped with soft black flat rubber for optimized airflow and easy management. 
 With OCP/OVP/UVP/OPP/OTP/SCP/SIP electrical protection. 
 Eco-friendly in accordance with RoHS and ErP 2014 directives.

name: Aerocool Air Cooler Cylon 4F ARGB PWM 4P - Black
shortDescription:
RGB LED design on the front and side of the air cooler adds a stylish flair to your rig
Comes equipped with 12cm Addressable RGB fan with translucent fan blades
Comes with built-in RGB lighting effects and compatibility with Addressable RGB motherboards or hubs
Heat Core Touch Technology with 4 ultra-efficient thermal heat pipes
Cover on the side of the air cooler achieves a unidirectional air flow, improving heat dissipation
Upgraded high efficiency fins for optimal thermal performance
Black coating on fins improves efficiency of heat dissipation
TDP (Thermal Design Power) up to 145W
description:
Overview 
PWM air cooling solution with stylish Addressable RGB LED on the front and side of the air cooler. Powered by Heat Core Touch Technology (HCTT) with 4 ultra-efficient thermal heat pipes. Black coating on fins increase heat dissipation area and improves efficiency of dissipation. Cover on the side of the air cooler achieves a unidirectional air flow, improving heat dissipation. 
 
Comes equipped with 12cm Addressable RGB fan with translucent fan blades that can be controlled using Addressable RGB motherboard or LED control button. 
 
 
DYNAMIC RGB LED DESIGN 
Featuring an RGB LED Ring on the front of the air cooler and a 12cm Addressable RGB fan with translucent fan blades, this cooler adds a stylish and dynamic effect to your rig. 
EQUIPPED WITH 12 CM ADDRESSABLE RGB FAN 
Comes equipped with 12cm Addressable RGB fan that can be controlled using Addressable RGB motherboard or LED control button. 
 
Translucent fan blades allow you to fully appreciate this fan’s beautiful RGB lighting. 
ADDRESSABLE RGB COMPATIBLE 
Access 16.8 million colors using compatible Addressable RGB motherboards including ASUS Aura Sync and MSI Mystic Light Sync as well as Gigabyte RGB Fusion motherboards using 3-Pin XWD connector. 
TOP COVER FOR IMPROVED AIR FLOW 
Cover on the top of the air cooler with an RGB LED Slash design achieves a unidirectional air flow, allowing heat to dissipate more quickly and efficiently while delivering stylish flair. 
 
 
HEAT CORE TOUCH TECHNOLOGY (HCTT) 
4 Heatpipes provide a perfectly flat and smooth surface to maximize contact surface area. 
 
This allows for minimal heat transfer loss while in direct contact with the CPU to increase the efficiency of heat dissipation. 
PWM HIGH-PRESSURE FAN 
120mm high-pressure fan provides a stronger airflow to push heat away from the aluminum fins faster. 
 
 
HIGH EFFICIENCY FINS 
Upgraded high efficiency fins for maximum thermal performance. 
 
Black coating on fins allows for faster heat absorption, improving the efficiency of heat dissipation. 
COMPATIBILITY 
Compatible with most current motherboard designs. 
 
Socket compatibility: LGA 2066/2011/115X/775 
AM4/AM3+/AM3/AM2+/AM2/FM2/FM1 
COMES WITH PWM 4-PIN CONNECTOR

name: AeroCool B508A Flow-G-BK-v1
shortDescription:
Mid-tower case compatible with ATX, m-ATX, and mini-ITX motherboards
Stylish front panel design with air ventilation for better circulation
Accommodates GPUs up to 340mm and CPU coolers up to 158mm
5 total fan slots fit up to four 140mm fans for even greater cooling potential
Includes top (magnetic) and bottom dust filters
Tempered glass side panel to show components
description:
Overview The AeroCool B508A Flow is designed for optimal airflow and high-performance gaming setups. With support for powerful GPUs, liquid coolers, and multiple fan configurations, it keeps your system running smoothly even under heavy loads. Show off your build with a tempered glass side panel while enjoying easy maintenance with magnetic dust filters. Airflow Meets Style Designed with a sleek front panel featuring air ventilation, the B508A Flow maximizes airflow while maintaining a bold, modern look. Keep your system cool and performing at its best without compromising on aesthetics. Optimized Airflow Potential
 Equipped with five total fan slots, including space for up to four 140mm fans, the B508A Flow ensures efficient heat dissipation. Keep your components running at peak performance with superior airflow. Liquid Cooling Excellence Support for radiators up to 280mm on the front and 120mm on the rear ensures optimal thermal performance. Room for High-Performance Hardware
 With support for GPUs up to 340mm, liquid coolers up to 280mm, and CPU coolers up to 158mm, this case is built for powerful setups. Enjoy smooth gaming and seamless multitasking with the hardware you need. Easy Maintenance Filters
 Keep your system clean and efficient with the magnetic top filter and removable bottom filter, designed for effortless cleaning and effective dust prevention. Showcase Your Build
 
A sleek tempered glass side panel lets you display your components with pride. Highlight your RGB lighting and premium hardware with a clear, stylish view.
